views.markdown: If you need help with "NoForcedSounds", you can contact Pancakeufo, the developer, via e-mail.
Pancakeufo is the maintainer of the package "NoForcedSounds". Please contact them via email for any questions on this version of the package.
If you found a mistake in the depiction or cannot download the package, you can reach out to the maintainer of the "Pancakeufo's Repo" repo, Pancakeufo.
